---
title: "The same walk at two scales"
description: "One random-walk primitive suggests which wiki pages to read and orders which corpus chunks to extract: identical math, different graph."
date: "2026-07-20"
categories: [retrieval]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Design.** The intended approach, not yet implemented.
:::

**Thesis.** One random-walk primitive suggests which wiki pages to read and orders which corpus chunks to extract: identical math, different graph.

**Draws on.** Drawn from the wiki's Hierarchical-Markov-Retrieval. Corpus side demonstrated; wiki side is open work.

## Outline

- 
- 
- 

_Stub. Expand from the seed page(s) above._
